xtermjs:scrollback.scroll-up.note: getCell reads from buffer, not viewport after scroll

xtermjs:text.wide.emoji.note: @xterm/headless reports emoji as single-width, not wide

vt100-rust:scrollback.accumulate.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose scrollback beyond screen height

vt100-rust:scrollback.total-lines.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose scrollback beyond screen height

vt100-rust:sgr.faint.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose faint/dim attribute

vt100-rust:sgr.blink.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose blink attribute

vt100-rust:sgr.hidden.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose hidden attribute

vt100-rust:sgr.strikethrough.note: Rust vt100 crate doesn't expose strikethrough
